assets.display_name: Tatooine-like Desert Planet Meshy Preview v0
assets.prompt: Chunky low-poly stylized desert planet sphere game token. Boxy cratered surface segments, warm tan and orange sand dunes texture, subtle dry cracks, no ring, low-detail voxel art style, flat colors, no photorealism.
acceptance_notes: Must be a stylized chunky desert planet shape that looks good from distance.

assets.display_name: Asteroid Rock Ore Mine Meshy Preview v0
assets.prompt: Stylized chunky low-poly voxel space asteroid rock. Jagged boxy geometry, sharp flat polygon surfaces, dark iron gray rock body, shiny brown and orange copper ore veins, game asset token, no text.
acceptance_notes: Must have blocky, low-poly jagged rocky edges.
Must show distinct stylized metallic ore color accents.
